## Summary of changes per file

All six plan-run surfaces updated to propagate D-419 P3 scheduler-default-posture prose per the #400 six-surface contract.

### 1. commands/kaola-workflow-plan-run.md (Claude command — github)
- Frontmatter description updated: "dispatching one frontier unit at a time" → "each frontier unit dispatched concurrently up to the fan-out cap (critical-path-first), with serial as the degraded fallback for write nodes or when lane containment is off"
- Opening body paragraph updated: "dispatching one frontier unit at a time and checkpointing between calls" → "dispatching the ready frontier unit concurrently up to the fan-out cap, topping up as nodes close, and checkpointing between calls; serial when a write node is live or lane containment is off"
- Added "Scheduler-default posture (D-419 P3)" block before "Deciding the unit" in the "Frontier unit / parallel batch" section: documents serial = max_concurrent=1 (degraded mode, not default), six serial-degrade conditions, and the planner rubric rewarding wide frontiers; parallel_safe is VALIDATOR-DERIVED

### 2. plugins/kaola-workflow/skills/kaola-workflow-plan-run/SKILL.md (Codex skill — github)
- Frontmatter description updated (same text as above)
- Opening body paragraph updated (same text as above)
- Added same "Scheduler-default posture (D-419 P3)" and "Planner rubric" blocks before "Deciding the unit"
